message:
fix(fk): process ALL child FK actions on parent delete, not just first match

check_fk_on_delete returned early on the first matching FK child table,
so ON DELETE SET NULL was never reached when ON DELETE CASCADE existed on
another child table. Changed to collect and execute all FK actions.

Also adds 25 conformance oracle tests covering: COLLATE NOCASE, complex
boolean expressions, correlated subqueries, UPSERT, aggregate DISTINCT,
type coercion, recursive CTEs, derived tables, GLOB/LIKE, transactions,
views, indexes, triggers, foreign keys, REPLACE, autoincrement, datetime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
